stem:
x − 29 = (x − a)(x − 29)

Which of the following are solutions to the given equation, where a is a constant and a > 30 ?

I. a
II. a + 1
III. 29
explanation: Move everything to one side: 0 = (x − a)(x − 29) − (x − 29) = (x − 29)[(x − a) − 1] = (x − 29)(x − a − 1). By the zero product property, x = 29 or x = a + 1. So the solutions are 29 and a + 1, which are statements III and II.
